'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=5HXsKTLsu7gShZ1ysB3g1PA5OqHUh.ZucJQASSU1KnI-1773640190-1.0.1.1-0VIzH1UwNaWUuPbOSf1G9uW3etx_W3ek._MIY4GMVfY"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
